failedAssertions.reason: Tests that mock ALL API calls cause app to redirect to login page instead of showing error UI. The 'API is unreachable' test shows login page after reload because auth token validation fails. Error toast implementation exists in stores but test approach doesn't trigger it correctly.

Tests that mock session create/profile load/chat API to return 500 still fail to show error UI. Stores call addToast correctly, but hasErrorUI() returns false. The 500 export test passes because the button click is properly wired to trigger the API call. Other tests may have timing or mock interception issues.

Tests that mock ALL API calls to timeout show login page instead of error UI. Similar issue to VAL-ERROR-001 - when all APIs fail, app redirects to login. Individual API timeout tests (session, settings) pass but specific timeout scenario fails.

flowReports.notes: Re-test after add-error-toasts-to-stores implementation. Error toast calls exist in stores but tests still fail due to test design issues: (1) mocking all APIs causes auth redirect to login, (2) individual API mocks may not properly trigger toast display

systemicIssues.description: E2E error handling tests have design flaws. Tests that mock all API calls (route.abort('failed') for **/api/**) cause the app to lose auth state and redirect to login, so error UI is never shown. Tests that mock individual APIs may have timing or mock interception issues.
systemicIssues.impact: VAL-ERROR-001, VAL-ERROR-002, VAL-ERROR-003 cannot be validated with current test approach. Tests expect error UI but app redirects to login when APIs fail during initial load.
systemicIssues.rootCause: Test design issue - hasErrorUI() checks for .toast--error but these never appear when auth validation fails. The store implementations (addToast calls) are correct but tests don't properly exercise them.

reRunNotes: Round 4 re-test after add-error-toasts-to-stores (status: completed). Implementation verified: stores now call addToast in catch blocks. But e2e tests still fail due to test design flaws - mocking all APIs causes login redirect instead of error UI. Test approach needs revision: individual API mocking with proper timing waits.
